response.justification: Over 15 years of professional fullstack development with a strong recent track record in exactly the required stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, MongoDB — plus current hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq. Testing discipline is unusually strong, demonstrated through open-source libraries, conference workshops, and consistent TDD practice. The primary gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Vitest specifically named, and limited evidence of Kotlin depth despite Java being listed.
strengths: Direct stack match: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK across multiple production roles
Active AI agent infrastructure experience including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling
Deep, demonstrated testing culture — TDD practitioner, test library author, testing workshop facilitator
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned; framework gap may require onboarding time
Kotlin/Python proficiency not evidenced despite being listed as required languages
Vitest and Playwright not explicitly named; testing expertise skews toward older or non-JS ecosystems (DLang, Selenium)

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
